name: FreshBooks
shortDescription: Cloud accounting integration for invoicing, payments, expenses, and project-based time tracking. Manage clients, invoices, estimates, expenses, payments, items, taxes, bills, vendors, projects, and time entries through a single connection, and pull financial reports — all secured with OAuth2.

actions.name: Find Clients
actions.description: Lists your clients, with optional filters. Use this to look up customers or pull a list to work through.

actions.name: Get Client
actions.description: Retrieves the full details of one client.

actions.name: Create Client
actions.description: Adds a new client — the person or business you invoice. Use this when onboarding a new customer.

actions.name: Update Client
actions.description: Changes details on an existing client. Only the fields you fill in are updated.

actions.name: Delete Client
actions.description: Removes a client. By default it is deleted; turn on archiving to keep a hidden copy instead.

actions.name: Find Invoices
actions.description: Lists invoices, with optional filters by client, status, and date. Use this to find invoices to act on or report.

actions.name: Get Invoice
actions.description: Retrieves one invoice in full, including its line items.

actions.name: Create Invoice
actions.description: Creates a new invoice for a client with one or more line items. The invoice starts as a draft — use Send Invoice to deliver it.

actions.name: Update Invoice
actions.description: Changes an existing invoice. Only the fields you fill in are updated. Providing line items replaces all existing ones.

actions.name: Send Invoice
actions.description: Sends an invoice to your client by email, or simply marks it as sent. Use this after creating a draft.

actions.name: Delete Invoice
actions.description: Removes an invoice. By default it is deleted; turn on archiving to keep a hidden copy instead.

actions.name: Find Estimates
actions.description: Lists estimates (quotes), with optional filters by client and date.

actions.name: Get Estimate
actions.description: Retrieves one estimate in full, including its line items.

actions.name: Create Estimate
actions.description: Creates a new estimate (quote) for a client. Send it for approval, then convert it to an invoice once accepted.

actions.name: Update Estimate
actions.description: Changes an existing estimate. Only the fields you fill in are updated. Providing line items replaces all existing ones.

actions.name: Send Estimate
actions.description: Sends an estimate to your client by email, or simply marks it as sent.

actions.name: Convert Estimate to Invoice
actions.description: Turns an accepted estimate into a new invoice, copying its client and line items.

actions.name: Delete Estimate
actions.description: Removes an estimate. By default it is deleted; turn on archiving to keep a hidden copy instead.

actions.name: Find Expenses
actions.description: Lists expenses, with optional filters by category, client, and date.

actions.name: Get Expense
actions.description: Retrieves one expense in full.

actions.name: Create Expense
actions.description: Records a business expense (money you spent). Use this to track costs and optionally bill them back to a client.

actions.name: Update Expense
actions.description: Changes an existing expense. Only the fields you fill in are updated.

actions.name: Delete Expense
actions.description: Removes an expense. By default it is deleted; turn on archiving to keep a hidden copy instead.

actions.name: Find Payments
actions.description: Lists payments received, with optional filters by client and date.

actions.name: Get Payment
actions.description: Retrieves one payment in full.

actions.name: Record Payment
actions.description: Records a payment received against an invoice. Use this to mark an invoice paid (in full or partially).

actions.name: Update Payment
actions.description: Changes an existing payment. Only the fields you fill in are updated.

actions.name: Delete Payment
actions.description: Removes a payment record. This reopens the related invoice's balance.

actions.name: Find Items
actions.description: Lists your saved products and services (reusable line items).

actions.name: Get Item
actions.description: Retrieves one saved product or service.

actions.name: Create Item
actions.description: Saves a reusable product or service you can drop onto invoices and estimates.

actions.name: Update Item
actions.description: Changes a saved product or service. Only the fields you fill in are updated.

actions.name: Delete Item
actions.description: Removes a saved product or service. By default it is deleted; turn on archiving to keep a hidden copy instead.

actions.name: Find Taxes
actions.description: Lists your saved tax rates.

actions.name: Create Tax
actions.description: Creates a reusable tax rate you can apply to invoices, estimates, and expenses.

actions.name: Update Tax
actions.description: Changes a saved tax rate. Only the fields you fill in are updated.

actions.name: Delete Tax
actions.description: Permanently removes a saved tax rate.

actions.name: Find Other Income
actions.description: Lists income recorded outside of invoices (e.g. online sales, rentals).

actions.name: Record Other Income
actions.description: Records income received outside of an invoice, such as online or in-person sales.

actions.name: Update Other Income
actions.description: Changes a recorded other-income entry. Only the fields you fill in are updated.

actions.name: Delete Other Income
actions.description: Permanently removes a recorded other-income entry.

actions.name: Find Tasks
actions.description: Lists your saved billable tasks (reusable services with a rate).

actions.name: Create Task
actions.description: Creates a reusable billable task with a default hourly rate.

actions.name: Update Task
actions.description: Changes a saved task. Only the fields you fill in are updated.

actions.name: Delete Task
actions.description: Removes a saved task. By default it is deleted; turn on archiving to keep a hidden copy instead.

actions.name: Find Credit Notes
actions.description: Lists credit notes (credits issued to clients), optionally filtered by client.

actions.name: Get Credit Note
actions.description: Retrieves one credit note in full.

actions.name: Create Credit Note
actions.description: Issues a credit note to a client (a credit they can apply to future invoices).

actions.name: Update Credit Note
actions.description: Changes a credit note. Only the fields you fill in are updated. Providing line items replaces all existing ones.

actions.name: Delete Credit Note
actions.description: Removes a credit note. By default it is deleted; turn on archiving to keep a hidden copy instead.

actions.name: Find Recurring Invoices
actions.description: Lists recurring invoice profiles (invoices that send automatically on a schedule).

actions.name: Get Recurring Invoice
actions.description: Retrieves one recurring invoice profile in full.

actions.name: Create Recurring Invoice
actions.description: Sets up an invoice that is created and sent automatically on a repeating schedule.

actions.name: Update Recurring Invoice
actions.description: Changes a recurring invoice profile. Only the fields you fill in are updated.

actions.name: Delete Recurring Invoice
actions.description: Stops and removes a recurring invoice profile. By default it is deleted; turn on archiving to keep a hidden copy instead.

actions.name: Find Vendors
actions.description: Lists your vendors (suppliers you buy from and record bills for).

actions.name: Create Vendor
actions.description: Adds a vendor (supplier) you can record bills against.

actions.name: Update Vendor
actions.description: Changes a vendor's details. Only the fields you fill in are updated.

actions.name: Delete Vendor
actions.description: Removes a vendor. By default it is deleted; turn on archiving to keep a hidden copy instead.

actions.name: Find Bills
actions.description: Lists bills you owe to vendors, optionally filtered by vendor.

actions.name: Get Bill
actions.description: Retrieves one bill in full, including its line items.

actions.name: Create Bill
actions.description: Records a bill you owe to a vendor (accounts payable).

actions.name: Update Bill
actions.description: Changes a bill. Only the fields you fill in are updated. Providing line items replaces all existing ones.

actions.name: Delete Bill
actions.description: Removes a bill. By default it is deleted; turn on archiving to keep a hidden copy instead.

actions.name: Find Bill Payments
actions.description: Lists payments you've made against vendor bills.

actions.name: Record Bill Payment
actions.description: Records a payment you made against a vendor bill.

actions.name: Update Bill Payment
actions.description: Changes a recorded bill payment. Only the fields you fill in are updated.

actions.name: Delete Bill Payment
actions.description: Removes a recorded bill payment. This reopens the bill's balance.

actions.name: Get Financial Report
actions.description: Pulls a financial report for a date range — profit & loss, tax summary, aging, and more.

actions.name: Get Account Info
actions.description: Returns details about the connected FreshBooks business — name, identifiers, and address.

actions.name: Find Projects
actions.description: Lists your projects, optionally filtered by a search term.

actions.name: Get Project
actions.description: Retrieves one project in full.

actions.name: Create Project
actions.description: Creates a project for a client, billed either as a flat price or by the hour.

actions.name: Update Project
actions.description: Changes an existing project. Only the fields you fill in are updated.

actions.name: Delete Project
actions.description: Permanently removes a project.

actions.name: Find Time Entries
actions.description: Lists logged time, optionally filtered by client, project, and date range.

actions.name: Get Time Entry
actions.description: Retrieves one time entry in full.

actions.name: Log Time
actions.description: Logs time worked, optionally against a client and project, ready to bill.

actions.name: Update Time Entry
actions.description: Changes a logged time entry. Only the fields you fill in are updated.

actions.name: Delete Time Entry
actions.description: Permanently removes a logged time entry.

actions.name: Find Services
actions.description: Lists your services — the categories of work used on projects and time entries.

actions.name: Create Service
actions.description: Creates a service (a type of work) you can attach to projects and time entries.

actions.name: Set Service Rate
actions.description: Sets the hourly rate for a service.

idealUseCases: Automating invoice creation, delivery, and payment recording for client billing
Onboarding new clients and keeping contact and billing details in sync from external sources
Tracking expenses, bills, and vendor payments for bookkeeping
Converting accepted estimates into invoices and sending them automatically
Logging billable time against projects and managing project rates
Generating financial reports (Profit & Loss, Tax Summary, Aging) for dashboards and review
Triggering downstream workflows when invoices, payments, or clients are created or updated
agentIdeas: When a **FreshBooks** "Record Created or Changed" trigger fires for a new payment, use **Gmail** "Send Message" to email the client a thank-you and receipt with the amount and invoice number
Use **Stripe** "List Charges" to pull recent card payments, then call **FreshBooks** "Record Payment" against the matching invoice so accounting stays reconciled with the payment processor

When a **FreshBooks** "Record Created or Changed" trigger fires for a new invoice, use **Google Sheets** "Add Row" to log the invoice number, client, amount, and status into a billing tracking spreadsheet
